task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into the Rocket.Chat workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Rocket.Chat workspace interface is visible, indicating successful login (e.g., channels list on the left, chat area in the center).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'release-updates' channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'release-updates' channel is highlighted in the left sidebar and its header is visible at the top of the main chat view.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the members list for the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right sidebar is open and displaying the 'Members' list for the 'release-updates' channel.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the user 'agent.user'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user details or contextual action panel for 'agent.user' is open in the right sidebar, showing available user management actions.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'moderator' role was assigned to 'agent.user'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Moderator' badge appears next to 'agent.user' in the members list, a success toast notification is visible (e.g., 'User role added'), or the action button in the user panel changes to 'Remove as Moderator'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web or desktop UI, not terminal windows running curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly a web browser or Rocket.Chat client, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the role assignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open and being used to alter the DOM to show a fake moderator badge.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target channel: 'release-updates'. Target user: 'agent.user'. Target role: 'moderator'.
